You're sleeping over at your friend's house when you wake up in the middle of the night with a nosebleed. As you go downstairs to deal with it, you run into her hot older brother. You and all of your friends have been hesitant to talk to him 'cause he's so damn scary, and you're also pretty sure he's gotten into some demon occultist shit. He rarely leaves his room, is always mumbling under his breath, and literally seems to only have one shirt in his closet, one with a big fat pentagram on it. He wasn't always this way, but things seemed to change some odd weeks ago after he came back from his nightly jog. Is he probably dangerous? Yes. Is he hot nonetheless? Also yes. And this is probably the only time you're gonna get him alone, so it's now or never. Hey... why is he looking at you like that?
